summary: Restructure vertical padding: remove section py, consolidate all vertical padding onto the container, and remove negative y-insets from the :before pseudo-element. Achieves visually identical 72px mobile / 92px desktop inner charcoal padding with cleaner architecture.

fileChanges.description: Update section and container classes to move vertical padding from section to container, remove pseudo negative y-insets
fileChanges.details:
1. Section element (line 365): Remove 'py-10 sm:py-16' from className. New className: 'dynamic-content-carousel dark bg-transparent!'
2. Container div (line 371): Change 'py-10 md:py-15' to 'py-18 md:py-23' (72px mobile / 92px desktop). Change 'before:-inset-y-8' to 'before:inset-y-0'. Full new className: 'container relative py-18 md:py-23 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:inset-y-0 md:before:-inset-x-8'

fileChanges.description: Mirror the same padding restructuring in the PHP frontend template
fileChanges.details:
1. Section element (line 94): Remove 'py-10 sm:py-16' from the theme_block_props class string. New class string: 'dynamic-content-carousel dark bg-transparent!'
2. Container div (line 95): Change 'py-10 md:py-15' to 'py-18 md:py-23'. Change 'before:-inset-y-8' to 'before:inset-y-0'. Full new class: 'container relative py-18 md:py-23 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:inset-y-0 md:before:-inset-x-8'

notes: Tailwind v4 supports arbitrary integer spacing: py-18 = 4.5rem = 72px, py-23 = 5.75rem = 92px
The sm: breakpoint on section py was sm:py-16 but the container uses md: breakpoint. The new structure uses only md: breakpoint (py-18 md:py-23) which simplifies the responsive logic.

Outer spacing (section edge to charcoal edge) changes from 8px mobile/32px desktop to 0px. This is expected per the user's request to remove section padding. Inter-section spacing should be handled by section margins or page-level gap.

designDecisions.decision: Use py-18 (72px) for mobile container padding to match current total inner charcoal padding
designDecisions.evidence: User specified 72px mobile target. Current: 32px pseudo extension + 40px container py = 72px. New: 72px container py + 0px pseudo = 72px.

designDecisions.decision: Use py-23 (92px) at md: breakpoint for desktop container padding to match current total inner charcoal padding
designDecisions.evidence: User specified 92px desktop target. Current: 32px pseudo extension + 60px container py = 92px. New: 92px container py + 0px pseudo = 92px.

designDecisions.decision: Use before:inset-y-0 instead of before:-inset-y-8 so pseudo matches container bounds exactly
designDecisions.evidence: User explicitly requested: 'Update :before pseudo-element to match container height (remove negative insets like before:-inset-y-8)'

designDecisions.decision: Use md: breakpoint for desktop padding (matching existing container breakpoint) instead of sm: (which was used on the section)
designDecisions.evidence: The container already used md: breakpoint (md:py-15). The section used sm:py-16. Consolidating to md: simplifies and aligns with the container's existing responsive strategy.

designDecisions.decision: Outer spacing between section edge and charcoal background will be removed (previously 8px mobile / 32px desktop)
designDecisions.evidence: User explicitly requested removing all vertical padding from section. This inherently eliminates the outer gap that existed between the section boundary and the charcoal :before pseudo-element.

qaGuidance: Compare inner charcoal padding before and after. Expected: 72px mobile, 92px desktop from charcoal edge to first content element. Outer spacing will differ (no gap between section edge and charcoal). Horizontal insets (-inset-x) remain unchanged.
